title: How Startups Are Building Scalable Apps Faster Using AI, No-Code, and Hybrid Development
description: The way startups build software has changed dramatically over the last few years. What once required large engineering teams, long development cycles, and significant upfront investment can now be achieved with smaller teams, faster timelines, and far more flexibility. title: OpenAI AI phone may arrive as soon as next year with MediaTek chip, says Kuo
description: OpenAI may be speeding up work on its rumoured AI agent smartphone, according to analyst Ming-Chi Kuo. The device could enter mass production in the first half of 2027 and may use a customised MediaTek Dimensity 9600 chip built for on-device AI tasks.
